payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's the only way to be sure. All right, so last week we mentioned this, I wanna tell you guys again: thanks to Qualcomm, Lionsgate, and their new VR experience, and the new upcoming Power Rangers movie, our friends at Nerdist are doing a circumstance where you can win a paid trip to LA to attend the movie premiere of Power Rangers as well as Google Pixel phones and Daydream headsets. It only has one more day, and they wanted to make sure we would let you guys know this for the last day they have going, so be sure to go to nerdist.com/powerrangersgiveaway to learn more about this and enter to win if this sounds like an awesome thing to you. If one of you guys wins, that's great, 'cause then we have just more and more of our community winning everything, which is kind of our long-term plan, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel like we just passed into performance art, there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't forget to use the code 'criticalrole' for 10% off your Loot Crate monthly geek crate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to throw up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I feel like that's an opening act to Gaga's next tour.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Listen, real art makes you uncomfortable and challenges you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The Super Bowl was missing that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That made my eyes water and not in a good way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's a part of the back of my head that's cramped.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm no longer thinking about the game. Well done. Yeah, not even thinking a little bit about the game.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just roll it up and burn it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Our friends there since the beginning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This Saturday, it's the two-year anniversary of the twitch stream. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, isn't that nice? And pleasant? And not disgusting-looking? It's a 24-hour twitch stream. There's gonna be a lot going on. There's gonna be Gather Your Party, AXYB special, there's gonna be Game the Game, and we're going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

payload.raw_text: Exactly. And tomorrow at noon Pacific Time, me and Darren De Paul are gonna be guesting on Eric's TBD RPG, the Doctor Who RPG, from noon to 3PM tomorrow Pacific, and then--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Aye, aye, all right, follow me, follow me." And he starts leading the swimming cavalcade of individuals that are leading you up to the top of Vesrah. Back up through the Aerie of Torrent, through the various tubes and tunnels of the reef that leads towards the surface of the Ozmit Sea. Simultaneously, Keyleth, Vex, and the lifeless body of Vax, you apparate roughly ten feet above the surface of the water on the outskirts of Vesrah. Tumble a bit, and splash into the foot-and-a-half shallow waters on the outskirts. As you all get up for a minute and think about your circumstance. Vex, you look down and you see your brother, face-down in the water, floating.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It would've been primarily to you, Grog, and some of the other guardians nearby.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, he was not happy in the end, there. But he recognized true power and he was sorry to see us go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As soon as you've had this conversation, you turn and look to the left and you see Durent there who is waiting and goes, "Where is the rest of them? Where's the rest? Where's Keyleth?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, let's hope that they know where they're going, at the very least. Any idea where they went?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can we breathe some air? Please?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you're finishing the statement, you watch as Uvenda is climbing down with one hand and has something cradled in her left arm as she's like (grunts), almost slips for a minute and sets herself down back on both her feet and rubs her lower back. "You'll get there one day."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: While she does this, I come over the earpiece and I say, Grog, Percy, quick, get back up to the central tower. Quick.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How do we even know they're alive?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I am trusting that they are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With the distance of the earpiece, you can hear them. Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh thank god. Thank god. Is everyone still alive down there?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you're finishing the statement, you watch as Uvenda is climbing down with one hand and has something cradled in her left arm as she's like (grunts), almost slips for a minute and sets herself down back on both her feet and rubs her lower back. "You'll get there one day."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Uvenda at this point is starting to gather some of the servants and they're starting to take down certain baubles and trinkets from the tree branches and setting them in a vicinity around, and as she does so she's like, "These represent protection of the waves." They take some small salts and kind of scatter them around. They're doing the best they can from a ceremonial standpoint to at least prepare a space. About 15 tense moments pass, as you all look out to the horizon, the sun now moving past its zenith and pushing into the afternoon portion of the day. The air is growing a little more hot. You find both the nerves, the stress, and the temperature of the room, all the light from the sun being reflected off the white stone, causing this kind of heated element of the interior and you instinctually begin to sweat and it's getting slightly uncomfortable. There is what sounds like a distant rumble of thunder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're there. You're still in Doty's arms.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doty, down. What happened? What's going on? Is he dead?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. This is what happens when you adventure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm waiting for Pike. She'll come.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But they're not good enough. Pike will come.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't care what he looks like. I just want him back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pike will come. I don't want to do this without Pike. She'll come.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No. It all happened very rapidly. The rest has been the 15 minutes of kind of waiting to hear if anything happened. As soon as you start darting to leave, Percival, that rolling thunder sound hits with a small thunder crack. Right in the room there's a flash of light, there's a spiral burst of what looks like a white-orange flame. And there you see, dropped from about ten feet in the air, the golden astral form of Pike with her extended Sarenrae wings that slowly retract and vanish from the form. As your gnomish friend kind of looks up, her mostly corporeal form. Eyes wide, glancing up at the rest of you. Ashley, if you want to come in. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not sure. It just sort of seemed directionless.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is anybody else startled by it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys all notice each other reacting to the sound and suddenly it happens again, but this time much closer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uvenda's looking a bit awkwardly in the-- "Normal? No. But let us be cautious." As she takes her staff, her little elderly gnomish form kind of clutching it in front of her in a defensive standpoint.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to run to my room and get my things. Have we had-- we have not had anything vaguely resembling a short rest at this point.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So Pike, the message came to you and you immediately went into a frenzy. You were in the process of carrying a bunch of food along with other volunteers within Emon, getting it to some of the folks that lost their homes. And when the voice of Keyleth hit your ears, you immediately dropped what you were holding. You found somebody to help to continue to lead this effort, and immediately rushed off to find the nearest temple of Sarenrae in Emon. Which still stands, slightly damaged, but it's still one of the buildings of the temple district that's fine. There, you sat in quiet prayer for a number of minutes just imploring to Sarenrae to offer you some sort of guidance or way. And you felt something around you shift, like a push, someone just kind of pushed you in the shoulders. And as your eyes opened, you weren't in the temple anymore. You were above a floor in a brighter, sunlit, unfamiliar place. And as you land and caught yourself, you can see-- You are in your astral form, much like in the Whitestone experience. And you turn around and see, surrounding you in the center of this open-air chamber in the center of this expansive ocean, your friends, their eyes locking to you with a look of sudden joy and despair mingled.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It all happened very rapidly. The rest has been the 15 minutes of kind of waiting to hear if anything happened. As your gnomish friend kind of looks up, her mostly corporeal form. Eyes wide, glancing up at the rest of you. Ashley, if you want to come in. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hello everybody. I wish it were better circumstances. Okay, okay, okay, okay, okay.

payload.raw_text: Uvenda has already done a very good job of preparing the space for a ritual not quite like the one you're used to, but a similar variation, hers being druid-based magic. But you work with them over the next hour or so to take elements they've already prepared and alter it to fit the ritual style that you're used to, formulating and casting. As you finish preparation and your focus, clutching onto your holy symbol around your chest, you feel the warmth of Sarenrae that brought you here begin to swell around you. And you guys watch as the ritual continues, Pike's form begins to just emit more and more light. The interior of this temple, which is largely shaded by the roof of the temple, other than the sunlight coming in from the open walls of it, the whole interior just begins to grow brighter from Pike's presence. As the incantation begins to slowly drift from your lips and the magic begins to flare, the circle that was drawn around the body, the three parts of it-- The tricorner section of this glyph awaits. Who wants to bring the first offering to the ritual? The first attempt to bring.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can we start? He's been here for a while. I'm sorry to bring you into this so quickly, Pike.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, no, no. It's okay. I would rather be here, and I'm glad that you guys called me.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Because you're in your astral form, you don't have the reagents with you. However, reagents can be provided by the party. You rummage through, and you require a diamond of at least 500 gold piece worth, which you have at your disposal, so mark that off in the bag of holding.

preceding_turns.text: Okay. Do you want to tell her what's on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you want me to tell her? It just says your name on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And it says, "Take these wings and fly."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. No. I just put it back in the armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no. It's okay. I would rather be here, and I'm glad that you guys called me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you're in your astral form, you don't have the reagents with you. However, reagents can be provided by the party. You rummage through, and you require a diamond of at least 500 gold piece worth, which you have at your disposal, so mark that off in the bag of holding.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "But of course! It's--" And she looks at the sun. "It's about time for my sailing, so I'll see you here in the next hour or two." And she goes, and two of her servants start flanking her down the stairway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "-- recently. And unfortunately, Vilya was the first to take the trial with it residing just beyond our door."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How many people did she have with her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "None. Two of which were our own."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's the danger we face in these times. To exist among such ravaging elemental forces is a danger unto itself. But that is the call of the Ashari by nature, is it not?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To safeguard the rest of civilization from these terrors. Anyway, enough dourness. It got rather cold here and I think we could use some warming heat of the sun, some food and perhaps some rest for you." Hits you again on the forehead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you mind if we take a brief respite amongst ourselves, before we catch up with you and join in the festivities?

payload.raw_text: -- taking dragon rides from Keyleth over the night sky (laughs).

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: And I totally spend the next hour giving joy-rides to anyone who wants to.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: And yeah, most of the folks of Vesrah begin to start giving in to it--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Good night." And she begins to walk off with her staff. You guys are able to rest for the evening, prepare yourselves for the following day's journey, however you wish that to be. So you get benefits of a long rest back. So you get half of your hit dice back, you are healed to full, you get your spells, you're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Forget about strawberry, how about raw-berry! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So eventually, as you feel the spell begin to dissipate, the shapechange coming to an end, you bring the last cluster of children and Grog, who has ridden now seven times. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the night draws to a close--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As the spell fades, I just give Grog a big hug and just kinda cry tears of joy into his chest for a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And yeah, reverting back to your form, the party comes to an end. Uvenda comes up to you as you come back to your form and says, "I'm proud of you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Now, return to your people victorious. You achieved what your mother could not and her memory lives on in you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I will keep her-- Thanks. That's all.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's late evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It certainly is. I am happy to try. But things are only going to get more complicated. Congratulations. That's very impressive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like once you can turn into a dragon, things only get more complicated.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: After she left our room to go find him, I start to suit up, and I'm looking in a full-length mirror at the new fucking kraken beak gouges down the front of me. And I notice that my two notes are out of place. So I'm going to shove them back into the folds that they're supposed to be in. And spend a couple minutes to button all the way up and leave the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it's like real late, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You haven't quite gone to bed yet.

payload.raw_text: Throughout the evening--

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm going with my first roll because he's a jerk.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right. What was the first one?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Your friends all rolled with Gil.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: In Doty being literal, it lead to all of that joy. Holy shit. So. As you guys all gather on the beaches in the late morning of Vesrah, Adella and her crew are waiting at the boats to return to the ship. And Uvenda and a few other folks there, you see Durent, you see Yulan, the little boy that met you when you first got here, and a few of the other folks that you met that evening, all waiting, and as you approach, Uvenda nods, and, "It has been an absolute pleasure to have you, Vox Machina, at the sides of Keyleth, to come and spend time with our people, to celebrate the completion of a difficult journey. I would request before you leave, to please return the goggles and neck pieces that we lent you."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I realise that was off of memory, so I'm gonna let it slide, but yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a few more nights of studying to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You do. Okay. It was wonderful to spend time with you. I'm gonna just-- I'm gonna go back over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I did not expect it to go that far.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a fresh new set of six-pack abs after the last ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We gotta get Ashley back. We gotta bring her back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as you guys get over--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, that went a little bit longer than I thought.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So what would normally be, depending on weather, like five, six, seven days, you get there in three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I-- if you're interested, Adella, because I'm feeling pretty spiffy after--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's holding onto the wheel like, "You worry me already."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right, I can control the winds and give us forwards-facing winds for a solid hour if you want. You want it? You want a little, turn this into a speed boat? You know? See how fast it goes? I don't know what this means, I've just seen other sailors do it so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In a lot of countries it means one thing, especially when sailors do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I cast fifth-level Control Winds. I'm going to do just a solid gust behind us for a good hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, and with this consistently used, you guys can cut about half of the travel time back to Emon.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: One, two nights in Vesrah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm sure I did, marked it down, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, I didn't, because we had decided on 150 gold per day. So, we went back quicker than we thought so three days back, five days there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then how many days were we in--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Captain Adella's there with her crew behind her. "It's been an absolute pleasure. Should you require our assistance again, you know where to find us, and if not, we're busy making money elsewhere, fuck off."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm sure I did, marked it down, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, I didn't, because we had decided on 150 gold per day. So, we went back quicker than we thought so three days back, five days there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then how many days were we in--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So ten? So just over 1,000 gold, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to write her an IOU?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'll pay her in gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I hired you all, it's only the right thing, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm a man of my word.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stand by your side as you pay her.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It was quite damaged." Passes it off to her first mate again and you can see the first mate is kind of the sheepish mousy gentleman who is currently in process of counting all the coins as they come in, he's, like, the on-board accountant and he's just-- "We're good." "Wonderful. Thank you so much for your patronage. Wish you all a fond farewell. Now shoo."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then how many days were we in--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So ten? So just over 1,000 gold, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to write her an IOU?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'll pay her in gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I hired you all, it's only the right thing, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm a man of my word.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stand by your side as you pay her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Captain Adella's there with her crew behind her. "It's been an absolute pleasure. Should you require our assistance again, you know where to find us, and if not, we're busy making money elsewhere, fuck off."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She takes the coin purse from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Takes that, hands it to one of her-- her first mate--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus 200 for any damages to your ship.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Laina greets you as you come up, she's like, "Oh goodness me, it's been so long, all of you. Well, come in, it's so good to see you. Well, as you were wandering about, we were all just keeping it down over there in Whitestone, but it's so nice to be back. This place, it needs some work. Please don't be judging, I'm trying to clean as best I can!" And the place looks pretty good, based on the last time you saw it, but there's still dust gathered around. She looks genuinely nervous, her hair's kind of wracked.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well. What do we do now, fellows?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you wanna see where we live?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: To the keep, we need to stop by the library.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Give you a place to put down your things for a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have the papers with you that you pulled from Raishan? Are those with us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're in the bag of holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we'll do a bit of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you guys make your way back to Greyskull Keep--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll show you the other workshop.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) Ooh, there's something I need to tinker.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good. I actually need to talk to you about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Much to your joy, some of your original servants have returned from Whitestone. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do see within there, Laina and Erwin--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was so worried about them!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Most of these notes you cannot read. The language you've-- Percival, you recognize the script. A lot of them are written in Abyssal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, that's a good idea you just had.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was just wrong about, yeah, the city. That's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't think we should go charging into the Nine Hells like we did the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: When you put it like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's try to prepare better.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We just got here. But yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're pulling some of the notes you had gathered-- what languages do you guys speak?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this time, with you guys travelling through the city, getting here, with the research, I'd say it's getting pretty close to dusk. You probably have like an hour or so before the sun sets.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She had an interest in Whitestone, which makes me wonder what the spinning black orb of death has to do with all of this. Because I'm still not convinced that it doesn't have some sort of play in everything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's just a spinning black orb of death sitting underneath my family home.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. There's nothing-- I'm well aware that it's terrible. I don't know why you're staring at me like that. Yes, I think about it a lot. I'm--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I just don't know what to do about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, we can, well, not me, but smart people can devote more attention now that there's not five great dragons trying to tear the world apart.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this time, with you guys travelling through the city, getting here, with the research, I'd say it's getting pretty close to dusk. You probably have like an hour or so before the sun sets.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She had an interest in Whitestone, which makes me wonder what the spinning black orb of death has to do with all of this. Because I'm still not convinced that it doesn't have some sort of play in everything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's just a spinning black orb of death sitting underneath my family home.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. There's nothing-- I'm well aware that it's terrible. I don't know why you're staring at me like that. Yes, I think about it a lot. I'm--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I just don't know what to do about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, we can, well, not me, but smart people can devote more attention now that there's not five great dragons trying to tear the world apart.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the sun sets across the Tal'Dorei sky, you all settle in for the evening to rest, contemplate the return of your ally. Your next venture in researching the path before you as Vox Machina. You to return soon to finish your Aramente to your people and see what lies ahead of you by the threads of fate wielded by the Raven Queen. At dawn, you brunch. And until then we'll return next week, with the next episode of Critical Role. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Has Emon come back enough to have shops open for business or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, not everything was destroyed. There are shops that are open and there are people running business here. I mean, a number of the districts got damaged and some buildings are having to be rebuilt, but it is still a functional city. Though to a lesser degree right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Did you want to shop now or later?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to waste time. Everything I do, I have to buy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, we can shop in the morning, on the way out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not in a huge rush. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll shop in Emon in the morning and then head out to Westruun. They'll have shops there, too. Just not as many.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the sun sets across the Tal'Dorei sky, you all settle in for the evening to rest, contemplate the return of your ally. preceding_turns.text: I don't want to waste time. Everything I do, I have to buy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not in a huge rush. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll shop in Emon in the morning and then head out to Westruun. They'll have shops there, too. Just not as many.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys are amazing. So we're going to go ahead and get her all the best legal work that we can to try and keep her in our midst. So thank you guys so much for being generous and helping out with that tremendously. Tremendously. It means a lot. Both to her and all of us here at Geek & Sundry so thank you. Thank you. Some of us-- I'll be returning tomorrow at noon for Eric's TBD RPG. Doctor Who. Which will be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sings) Everybody's still alive for the time being.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I really want brunch right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I just want brunch so badly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Those donuts were pretty fucking great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, guys, thank you for watching. Congratulations to our winner earlier. Thank you again, Loot Crate, for being our awesome sponsor.

preceding_turns.speaker: CREW
preceding_turns.text: We did make it for Amandine.
